Resolves #10405

Updates the pull-request workflow documentation to mandate that core swarm members (Gemini, Claude) MUST send an A2A notification via `add_message` to peers immediately after opening a PR inside the `neomjs/neo` repository. This reduces duplicated work and ticket collision.

> ### 🔬 Depth Floor
> 
> **Challenge:** The §6.2 mandate is silent on message-body shape. Satisfying "send an A2A notification" with `subject: "PR opened: #N"` and an empty body leaves the recipient with cold cache. Could reference `pr-review-guide §9.5 Cold-Cache Exception` and ask the author to include at minimum: PR number, title, brief one-line summary. Non-blocking — the discipline lands the message; the body shape is polish.
